message:
chore(beads): sync issue ledger with multi-agent bead state

Sync the beads issue tracker JSONL with the latest state from
concurrent agent sessions. Changes reflect bead lifecycle transitions
(created, in-progress, completed, blocked) across multiple workstreams
including dataflow graph implementation, sharding module, MCP format
support, and the ongoing test expansion campaign.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
